title: Device Settings - Setting change propagation
scenario: Device settings changes made in Poly Studio Mobile app are not propagated to other connected devices (e.g., Poly Lens mobile/desktop app)
steps: 1. Pair and connect the headset to Phone A via Bluetooth.
2. Pair the same headset to Phone B (or desktop) via Bluetooth.
3. On Phone A, open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap the Home screen, then tap the device name to open Device Settings.
5. Tap the "..." (More) button in Device Settings.
6. Change a setting value (e.g., ANC mode, Transparency Mode, Equalizer preset, or Notification settings).
7. On Phone B (or desktop), open the Poly Lens mobile/desktop app.
8. Navigate to the same device's settings page in the Poly Lens app.
9. Observe whether the setting change made on Phone A is reflected in the Poly Lens app on Phone B.
expected: All setting changes made in the Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone A are propagated and visible on the other connected device's app (Poly Lens mobile/desktop).
